hero.description: Focused on systems stability, security, and scalability. Specialist in distributed architectures and critical infrastructure management.

projects.title: Infrastructure & Systems
projects.description: Critical systems, digital asset management, and technical optimization.

comido.title: Comido
comido.description: Implemented a microservices-based architecture, setting up GitLab and Plane instances for development lifecycle management. Configured production environments on Linux systems with Docker to ensure scalability.

ncc.title: NCC - Infrastructure
ncc.description: High-availability infrastructure for machinery management. Implemented SSR architecture and optimized data access in low-connectivity areas, guaranteeing information integrity and critical name resolution.

Magnolia.title: Magnolia Jewelry
Magnolia.description: Digital Asset Management and DNS Security. Managed name resolution (DNS) and configured infrastructure to guarantee 100% uptime during critical system migrations, preventing service outages.

ecos.title: Ecos del Desierto
ecos.description: Resource optimization and database management. Implemented an event engine and an optimized data system to reduce server load, ensuring data integrity in high-demand environments.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Software Engineer focused on ensuring the stability, security, and scalability of systems. My experience lies in building robust architectures and managing critical infrastructure.
about.p2: As a technical lead, I specialize in implementing microservices and administering production environments (Linux/Docker), always ensuring data integrity and 100% uptime.
about.p3: Awarded the Entrepreneurship Scholarship and recognized as an "Emerging Entrepreneur" by Tecnológico de Monterrey (2025) for my work in distributed systems development.
about.p4: Currently in my 8th semester of Computer Science Engineering at the Universidad Autónoma de Chihuahua.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it and see how I can help.
contact.findMeOn: You can also find me on:
